_meta.notes: Secretary→secretary continuation case. Per architect cell-6 design: defer-Teardown predicate returns False for exempt-agentType continuations (carve-out semantics). Bug A in this scenario is INTENTIONALLY not addressed at the predicate layer; covered by Bug B re-Arm branch firing on next non-exempt teammate claim. See test_secretary_bug_a_documented_not_fixed_in_this_pr for the canonical pin. NOTE: production task files persist forward-pointing linkage as `blocks` (populated, e.g., ['2']) NOT `addBlocks` (null/empty in production); the fixture captures both fields with empirical values for predicate-shape resilience.
